zh: 三歲以後的才會開始共同遊戲、
en: Only after age three do children start playing cooperatively,

zh: 這時候親子遊戲就顯得特別重要、
en: and at this point parent-child play becomes especially important.

zh: 除了和同伴一起遊戲以外、
對孩子來說是最大的喜悅、
en: is the greatest joy a child can have.

zh: 同時父母要讓幼兒有機會到公園和其他兒童一起遊玩、
en: Parents should also take young children to parks to play with others,

zh: 這種經驗有助於孩子日後在團體中的適應。
en: as these experiences help them fit into groups later in life.
